## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Public Contract Impact

- [ ] No public API/schema/SDK/docs impact
- [ ] HTTP/OpenAPI changed
- [ ] JSON schema changed
- [ ] SDK changed
- [ ] Pricing/billing behavior changed
- [ ] MCP/A2A behavior changed
- [ ] Docs/examples updated

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run contracts`
- [ ] `npm run benchmark`
- [ ] `npm run secrets:check`
- [ ] `npm run package:check`

## Safety

- [ ] No `.env`, database, log, zip, token, key, or secret files included
- [ ] Payment/idempotency behavior is unchanged or tested
- [ ] Trust receipt/signature behavior is unchanged or tested
